name: Branch address creation (address form)
pageTitle: Add branch address - Import and export applications - GOV.UK
heading: Add branch address

structure.govukComponent: Link (govuk-link, in a govuk-body paragraph above the form)
Fieldset (legend govuk-fieldset__legend--m) grouping the address fields

govukComponents.usage: Groups the address block (lines 1-3, city, postcode, telephone, country, email) under legend 'Branch address'. NOTE: 'Branch address name' sits OUTSIDE the fieldset, above the legend.
Branch address name, Address line 1-3, City or town, Postcode or ZIP code, Telephone number, Email address (all width-one-half)
govukComponents.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 159; every input resolved to class='govuk-input govuk-!-width-one-half'

govukComponents.usage: Country selector (254 options incl. placeholder) — reference data. UK constituent nations are nested in an <optgroup> (see fields.country).
govukComponents.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 159 — select resolved to class='govuk-select govuk-!-width-one-half' (confirmed again at action 162)

govukComponents.usage: Field labels; 'Branch address name' uses --m, the rest are plain govuk-label

govukComponents.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 159; page object btnSaveAndContinue (BranchAddressCreationPage.ts:43-45)

fields.name: company-name
fields.label: Branch address name
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 159 (id/name=company-name, type=text, autocomplete=organization, label 'Branch address name', govuk-label--m; sits above/outside the 'Branch address' fieldset). Page object: BranchAddressCreationPage.ts:7-9 (inputBranchAddressName), filled from Address.name — types/address.ts:2. DEFAULT_CONFIG.branchAddress.name='Green Systems' (ched-p-workflows.ts:199). required=false is client-side only (no HTML required attr observed); mandatory status is server-enforced — see openQuestions.

fields.label: Address line 1
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 159 (id/name=address-line-1, autocomplete=address-line1). Page object: BranchAddressCreationPage.ts:11-13 (inputAddressLine1), filled from Address.addressLine1 — types/address.ts:3. DEFAULT_CONFIG.branchAddress.addressLine1='105 Broadway' (ched-p-workflows.ts:200).

fields.name: address-line-2
fields.label: Address line 2 (optional)
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 159 (id/name=address-line-2, autocomplete=address-line2, label carries '(optional)'). Page object: BranchAddressCreationPage.ts:15-17 (inputAddressLine2), filled from Address.addressLine2 — types/address.ts:4. DEFAULT_CONFIG.branchAddress.addressLine2='Suite 3' (ched-p-workflows.ts:201). Genuinely optional.

fields.name: address-line-3
fields.label: Address line 3 (optional)
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 159 (id/name=address-line-3, autocomplete=address-line3, label carries '(optional)'). Page object: BranchAddressCreationPage.ts:19-21 (inputAddressLine3), filled from Address.addressLine3 — types/address.ts:5. DEFAULT_CONFIG.branchAddress.addressLine3='Building 10' (ched-p-workflows.ts:202). Genuinely optional.

fields.name: city-or-town
fields.label: City or town
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 159 (fill 'Greenville'; id/name=city-or-town, autocomplete=address-level2). Page object: BranchAddressCreationPage.ts:23-25 (inputCityOrTown), filled from Address.cityOrTown — types/address.ts:6. DEFAULT_CONFIG.branchAddress.cityOrTown='Greenville' (ched-p-workflows.ts:203).

fields.name: postcode
fields.label: Postcode or ZIP code
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 159 (id/name=postcode, autocomplete=postal-code) and action 160 directly records Fill "10002" into the resolved Postcode or ZIP code control. Page object: BranchAddressCreationPage.ts:27-29 (inputPostcodeOrZipCode).

fields.name: telephone
fields.label: Telephone number
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 159 (input type=tel, id/name=telephone, autocomplete=tel) and action 161 directly records Fill "01100100102" into the resolved Telephone number control. Page object: BranchAddressCreationPage.ts:31-33 (inputTelephoneNumber).

fields.name: country
fields.label: Country
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 159 — <select id/name=country, class 'govuk-select govuk-!-width-one-half'>, 254 <option> nodes; placeholder 'Please select your country' (value='') is the default. First 20 option labels verbatim above. ISO-code semantics CONFIRMED (not merely inferred): action 162 selects the country by value 'GB-ENG' and the trace return value is ['GB-ENG'] — so each <option> renders the country name as text but submits the ISO code as its value (e.g. Afghanistan=AF, France=FR, United States of America=US). STRUCTURE: the UK constituent nations are NOT flat entries — they are nested inside an <optgroup label='United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland'> holding England=GB-ENG, Scotland=GB-SCT, Wales=GB-WLS, Northern Ireland=GB-NIR, positioned between 'United Arab Emirates' and 'United States Minor Outlying Islands'. Page object: BranchAddressCreationPage.ts:35-37 (dropdownCountry, getByLabel('Country')). types/country.ts corroborates the code list. This is reference data — the new app should source name+code pairs (and the optgroup grouping if retained) from a reference-data service, not hardcode it.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 159 (input type=email, id/name=email, autocomplete=email, spellcheck=false) and action 163 directly records Fill "peakperformance@test.com" into the resolved Email address control. Page object: BranchAddressCreationPage.ts:39-41 (inputEmailAddress).

corroboration.fieldParity: 1:1 — the page object exposes exactly the nine fields captured from the trace (Branch address name, Address line 1-3, City or town, Postcode or ZIP code, Telephone number, Country, Email address) plus the Save-and-continue button. No hidden or variant-only control was found in the page object; the trace is a complete inventory of this page's controls.
corroboration.journeyContext: Reached from the Contact Address page via the 'Add new branch address' link. On Save-and-continue the user lands on Branch Address Confirmation (single button 'Return to notification', BranchAddressConfirmationPage.ts:6-8); 'Return to notification' navigates back onto Branch Address Creation, where Save-and-continue is pressed a SECOND time to proceed. This create->confirm->return->continue loop is exercised in the CHED-P journey.

openQuestions: CAPTION: an earlier draft of this spec claimed a caption 'DRAFT.GB.2026.1525979 - CHEDP' rendered above the H1. This was FABRICATED — the frozen DOM at action 159 has zero elements matching [class*=caption] anywhere in the document, and the H1 (id=page-primary-title) contains only 'Add branch address' with no caption span. The notification reference DRAFT.GB.2026.1525979 appears only inside the 'Return to notification' href, and '- CHEDP' appears nowhere on this page. caption is now null.

URL pattern: the header-provided pattern (.../branch-address/create) was not observed. The form posts to action='new' relative to '/notification/vnet/protected/notifications/{chedReference}/traders/organisation branch address/new' (with a literal space in the path segment). The page object does not assert a URL, so this is unconfirmed by source 2 — verify against legacy source in a later wave.

No field carries an HTML 'required' attribute (all client-side required=false) and no hint text is rendered. Required/optional semantics for Branch address name, Address line 1, City/town, Postcode, Telephone, Country and Email are enforced server-side only — not observed here. Address line 2/3 are labelled '(optional)' (confirmed by trace and page object), implying the others may be mandatory, but no test asserts any validation and no error-state trace for this page exists in the corpus. Validation copy is a genuine GAP — mine an error-state trace or read legacy source (separate wave) to confirm which fields are required and to capture exact messages.

Country list nests England/Scotland/Wales/Northern Ireland inside an <optgroup label='United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland'> (ISO codes GB-ENG/GB-SCT/GB-WLS/GB-NIR), while the rest of the world is a flat option list. Confirm whether the new app's reference-data country list should preserve this optgroup grouping and the UK constituent-nation options, and whether it should submit ISO codes (as the legacy select does) rather than display names.
The field name 'company-name' backs the visible label 'Branch address name' — a legacy naming carry-over. New app should use a semantically accurate field name.

Journey has a double Save-and-continue on this page (create -> confirmation -> return to notification -> land back on creation -> Save-and-continue again). Confirm whether the new app needs this create/confirm/return loop or whether a single submit should persist the branch address directly — this is legacy navigation architecture the new app is explicitly told NOT to copy.
